title: Optimize UTF-8 to UTF-16LE transcoding throughput [three quarter million mixed]
goal: Transcode a valid UTF-8 string to UTF-16LE and return a checksum over the exact UTF-16 code unit sequence.
metric: median elapsed_ns over repeated runs; lower is better
correctness_rule: Returned checksum must exactly match the expected checksum over the UTF-16 output sequence.
